meaning: n.[计] 整理磁盘文件碎片的工具
examples: Before going to bed, I decided to run defrag so that I will find my Windows zippy the next day.
Basically put, you'll never have to remember to defrag your drive because it will be done automatically.
High-speed Disk defrag function to defragment hard drives up to 10 times faster than other defragmentation tools.
Set aside about 45 minutes to defrag your hard disk, a task you should perform at least once a month.
Simplify the process of setting up your PC's performance by conveniently providing you with the option to tweak, defrag, or update any outdated drivers.
